Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Nelula Seiren]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — Nelula Seiren is the Planetary Governor of Visiria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — Nelula Seiren has pale pink skin and hair styled in an elaborate nest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — Nelula Seiren's hair, ears, neck, and wrists shine with gold and rubies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — Nelula Seiren has a third eye that glows bright red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 29''' — Nelula Seiren is the Planetary Governor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 30''' — Nelula Seiren is the Planetary Governor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 30''' — Nelula Seiren is an old woman.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 27''' — Nelula Seiren is the Planetary Governor of Visiria.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
